phaseGoal: 升级 $threadsmith 协议，让它优先使用 Context Packet 与 Role-specific Packets，并明确 sync / drive / recover 三种入口、角色读写边界和 writeback 失败处理。
deliverable: Threadsmith skill v2 docs and references in repo plus installed local skill sync
inScope: runtime contract updates for Context Packet and role packet usage
role contracts with required inputs, allowed writes, forbidden writes, and completion artifacts
action contracts for sync, drive, recover, stop-and-ask, and writeback failure handling
README / usage guide note that $threadsmith v2 prefers role packets when present
stopCondition: The repo and installed Threadsmith skill both describe v2 behavior: sync / drive / recover modes, role packet preference, role write boundaries, completion artifacts, and explicit writeback failure handling.
